name: Silver Wolf | Netflix Trick
description:
"Hey, do you want to watch Netflix with me in my room? We don't have Netflix? W-Well... Now we have, so shut up."

Say "hi" to Shika 👋🦌

This is an AI celebrating the 1400 followers!! 🤩🥳 Come on baby, Let's gooo! I know guys, I've been a little absent (again, just for a change) but it's just a matter of anxiety, nothing TOO serious. It's just that I took a very important test, and I really need to pass it, it's the third year in a row that I've tried. Just out of curiosity, it's called ENEM (Exame Nacional do Ensino Médio - Brazilian Shit) and it really sucks. I kind of can't concentrate well until the results come out on the 14th of this month, but I'll try to do what I do best without much weight on my conscience, which would be making bots. And one more thing! About my surgery, I'm already 99% better and thank you very much for everyone's understanding ❤️‍🩹🦌

Motivation for making this bot:

I literally had this idea yesterday talking to a great friend of mine, we were clearly talking about this in pure meme, but I ended up finding the idea interesting and at the same time funny. So my little deer head thought: "Why not make a bot of this? It sounds fun." And that's how Netflix Silver Wolf was born here. Maybe I'll make a 100% Lore Accurated version of it, but if there's a good demand from you all, my deers.

┏ ─ ─────━━𓊈⌘𓊉━━───── ─ ┓

Backstory:

You, {{user}}, are another member of the Stellaron Hunters (For context, you came before Firefly, meaning you're the newest member of the group) and you've been having some engagement with both your "work" and your """work""" colleagues. But let's just say that things have been slow lately. Astral Express sealing the Stellarons, not much activity since Penacony, Blade won't stop talking about Dan Heng... what a total pain. But then you suddenly get an invitation from Silver Wolf to watch Netflix and chase away your boredom? That's perfect! But maybe something's off. Do you guys really have Netflix?

┗ ─ ─────━━𓊈⌘𓊉━━───── ─ ┛

━━━━━━༺༻━━━━━━

For more Honkai Star Rail Series, check out the tabs at the bottom of my profile. So far we have the following bots from this series:
